name: Taisei Lamick Co., Ltd.
summary: Taisei Lamick Co., Ltd. develops and sells liquid and paste packaging systems in Japan. It offers films, including XA-series products; and filling machines, such as DANGAN series products and filling peripheral equipment, as well as managed apparatus/IT relation products. The company was formerly known as Taisei Houzai K.K. and changed its name to Taisei Lamick Co., Ltd. in April 1991. Taisei Lamick Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Shiraoka, Japan.
